programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: A deceased tycoon's unit goes up for sale; antique kitchen gear; soaring highs and crushing lows greet the bidders.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: Bubba plans to bid high against Victor; Jenny finds an item with stimulating properties; Mary and Moe plan a strategy; Ricky finds a collectible coin.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell hopes to humiliate Ivy in his own backyard; Jarrod and Brandi are surrounded by pigs; Rene purchases a "crappy" locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene's superstitious attitude could prove to be a hindrance; Ivy trusts his gut; Jarrod and Brandi manage to get the last laugh on their rivals.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers head to Montebello, where there are a number of lockers for auction; Brandi has the resale market covered; Ivy mines his way into some vintage safety gear.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon need to secure merchandise for their Website; an exhausted Ivy switches into robot mode; Rene dresses for success; Jarrod and Brandi try a new strategy.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy hunts for high-end items in Moreno Valley; Jarrod reveals his alter ego to Brandi; Darrell flies solo; Rene has a close encounter with death.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Justin and Ashley's plans to sell their home in Auburn, Washington are thrown into chaos when the property is overrun by intruders; when Flash and his team arrive to remove the squatters, what should be a routine civil matter quickly turns criminal, as police descend on the property upending the entire operation.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Garland, Texas, Flash Shelton and his team help a family repossess their deceased brother's home from a squatter who moved in on the day that their brother died.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Kory and Mackenzie bought land to build their future home in rural Spokane, Washington; however, squatters have taken it over and are impacting the nearby property; with the site completely trashed and interactions becoming hostile, Flash and his team step into one of their most unpredictable situations yet.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash heads to Philadelphia to help Paul, who returns from a stint in Vegas to start a family with his fiancée, only to find a stranger has taken over his Pennsylvania home; when Flash confronts multiple occupants, tensions mount, culminating in a boiling standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In North Carolina, a shady real estate scam leaves Tamera fighting squatters who've seized her beautiful 58-acre property, with her beloved horses trapped inside; as the squatters taunt Flash and his team, tensions explode in a desperate fight to reclaim the land and rescue the animals.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cle Elum, Washington, Casey lost her dream home to a stranger who claimed it as her own for over 4 months and even tried to rent rooms out to other people for profit; but when Flash and his team move in, will their tactics be enough for this squatter to finally leave once and for all?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: The team head to Conroe, Texas, to help a grieving family reclaim their late grandmother's home from a squatter couple who moved in after her passing; tensions run high when the couple resists leaving.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: Two brothers find themselves in a heated showdown with a group of Alabama golfers during an afternoon on the back nine.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Florida, a man's refusal to move his van from the middle of the road quickly lands him in handcuffs; in Pennsylvania, a Halloween party takes a terrifying turn when an angry man crashes through the front door; and in Washington state, a heated confrontation erupts when a vocal protester targets a dog owner.
